title: TARDIS Universe modpack
description: a pack that adds a ton of doctor who stuffs
body:
### TARDIS Universe

#### This modpack contains:

*   Create! - Automation through kinetics
*   Adventures in time - Adds the TARDIS, travel through your world through flight and even go to space!
*   Origins - change your origin story to gain different abilities to help you progress along or just to troll your friends with.
*   Regeneration - Regenerate 12 times instead of dying, beware, the post regeneration effects will get to you and bring you near death.
*   And more!
